category_sources: source_facts.description says it decodes x86 binaries and prints ISA extensions in use.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for the binary analysis tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official elfx86exts repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
docs.rs provides Rust crate API documentation for elfx86exts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pkgw/elfx86exts; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies x86 binary decoding, ELF and Mach-O, and ISA extension reporting.
